title: Containment Lock Alpha
subtitle: CRYO SPECIMEN SEQUENCER // PUZZLE ONE
intro: Dr. Wu's cryo sequencer scrambled during the evacuation. Slide the amber specimen tiles back into the correct order to release the lock combination.
puzzleBody: Tap a tile next to the empty slot to slide it. Arrange specimens 1 through 8 in order — left to right, top to bottom.
solvedMessage: Sequencer restored. Use this combination on Containment Lock Alpha.
